name: Tee Box San Marcos
address: 1619 S Rancho Santa Fe Rd, San Marcos, CA 92078
about: Tee Box San Marcos is an indoor golf training facility equipped with advanced TrackMan simulator technology, offering a comprehensive environment for golf improvement and practice. The venue provides a range of services including swing coaching, club fittings, physical assessments, and fitness programs, all designed to enhance a golfer's performance through data-driven insights. Membership-based access allows for flexible booking of hitting bays and gym facilities, catering to individual practice, group events, and corporate functions.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade TrackMan technology provides precise swing and ball flight data for detailed analysis
Comprehensive fitness and nutrition programs to address physical limitations and improve game performance
On-demand coaching and personalized assessments available to all members
Flexible membership options with access to both simulators and gym facilities
Welcoming and professional staff focused on continuous learning and improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No information about food service available
No information about alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual radar and camera system with high-speed capture for precise swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs. The facility also offers club fittings and repairs for those needing equipment adjustments.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No information regarding outside food or drinks is provided. Members should check the facility's policy directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to complete 18 holes is not specified, as sessions are booked by the hour for hitting bay usage.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Box offers youth programs and provides a welcoming environment for children to learn and play golf.
